purpose: Map buyer-facing and operator-facing claims to exact repo proof paths before any public launch, outreach, payment, upload, GPU, or training action is approved.

claims.claim: The repo contains a local 10-image logo seed dataset with metadata for Afterparty Forge 2045.
claims.allowed_copy: Local logo seed dataset exists for private review and verifier-backed handoff.
claims.forbidden_copy: Do not claim it was trained on, uploaded, sold, or publicly released unless separately verified.

claims.claim: The entity has a local payload package and manifest that can be reviewed before install or sharing.
claims.allowed_copy: A local payload package path exists for awake operator review.
claims.forbidden_copy: Do not call it installed for a buyer, externally delivered, or revenue-generating without proof.

claims.claim: The first-dollar path is a draft-only offer with closed money and outreach gates.
claims.allowed_copy: A private first-dollar offer draft is ready for awake review.
claims.forbidden_copy: Do not claim revenue, checkout availability, sent outreach, customer interest, or payment acceptance.

claims.claim: The repo includes static site files for the existing GitHub/Pages workflow.
claims.allowed_copy: Static site files are present in the repo and reference the entity tool suite.
claims.forbidden_copy: Do not imply a new public launch, sponsorship, event affiliation, or external posting happened during unattended work.

claims.claim: Hugging Face dataset upload remains human-approved only; this repo only provides local usage and uploader materials.
claims.allowed_copy: HF upload is prepared but closed until token-backed human approval.
claims.forbidden_copy: Do not claim private/public HF upload, training readiness on Hub, remote streaming success, or model training unless verified after approval.

operator_next_step: Use this ledger to choose which claims can appear in a private demo or buyer-facing draft. Keep yellow claims as caveats until their external verification is complete.
unattended_safety_note: This ledger records proof only. It does not authorize payment links, outreach, spend, public posting, private uploads, GPU jobs, training, wallets, or affiliation claims.
